allow: Bash(wget -q -O /tmp/necas_wget.html --user-agent="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.autoskolanecas.cz/")

Bash(curl -v -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' --max-time 15 -H 'Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml' -H 'Accept-Language: cs-CZ,cs;q=0.9' https://www.autoskolanecas.cz/contact-us)
